steps.title: Use the given definition
steps.content: The question defines average acceleration as change in speed divided by time. Here the change in speed is $30$ meters per second and the time is $8$ seconds.

steps.title: Divide speed change by time
steps.content:
Compute the quotient:
$$
\frac{30}{8}=3.75
$$
The units are meters per second squared because meters per second is divided by seconds.
